description_long: This object is a fantastical hot-air balloon airship, featuring two large, faceted, polygonal balloon envelopes made of a light-colored fabric, supported by a wooden frame. The main body is a boat-like wooden gondola with a curved prow, open deck, and railings, giving it a nautical appearance. The deck is spacious, with visible planks and a raised section at the rear, possibly for navigation or control. The balloon envelopes are attached to the gondola with sturdy struts and visible suspension cables, providing structural support. The overall design blends elements of a traditional sailing ship and a hot-air balloon, with a whimsical, steampunk-inspired aesthetic. There are no visible logos, symbols, or registration markings on the envelopes or gondola.
description: A whimsical, boat-shaped hot-air balloon airship with two faceted, light-colored envelopes and a wooden gondola featuring open decks and railings. The design combines nautical and aeronautical elements with visible support cables and a steampunk flair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed prow, dual balloon envelopes, and the symmetrical arrangement of the support struts and cables.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the open wooden deck, curved railings, and the attachment points of the balloon envelopes to the gondola.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stern of the gondola, the alignment of the two balloon envelopes, and the open deck area.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the boat-like hull, the rear deck, and the structural supports for the envelopes.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The balloon envelopes are a solid light beige color with no visible decorative patterns, stripes, or symbols.
